query: Extract line items, total taxes, and payment terms from this invoice document.
input_document:
INVOICE #INV-2024-0815

Issued: August 15, 2024
Due Date: September 15, 2024

Line Items:
1. Software License - Annual: $15,000.00
2. Professional Services (40 hours @ $150/hr): $6,000.00
3. Technical Support (12 months): $2,400.00

Subtotal: $23,400.00
Sales Tax (8.875%): $2,078.63
Service Fee: $500.00
Total Tax and Fees: $2,578.63
TOTAL DUE: $25,978.63

Payment Terms: Net 30 days. 2% early payment discount if paid within 10 days. Wire transfer to Wells Fargo Bank, Account #987654321.
